If Saturn is strong and has good aspects with Jupiter, then there will be earnings from
immoveable property, renovation of dwelling place or new residential accommodation.
5th bhava: An afflicted Saturn denies children but a strong Saturn gives happiness of
children to married couples at an appropriate age.
Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
14

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
If Jupiter or Saturn goes to Paribhraman Ascendant, 2nd, 3rd, 5th, 7th, 9th and 11th bhavas
during that time it is favourable for conception.
Saturn in 5th bhava does not give success in exams, lottery and gambling and does not give
favourable results to new enterprises.
